title: Inside The system
body:
![Inside The System](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20a6a59d62ea418d8b0041e9c68dcc4a8a127b4b.png) ## If you find any bugs, please let me know at dregir5@gmail.com ## ### The first version may contain bugs since the mod is large and I can't test everything. If you find any issues, please let us know on our Discord server! Join us! https://discord.gg/NE6fdKPXFG _You can donate to support the project, in return you will receive secret or early versions of my mods:_ https://boosty.to/dregirwhat --- Hi, I don't remember how I got here, but I think we'll have a good time together!!!! **This is the full (unsafe) version of the mod.** It contains real meta-interactions with your PC. ### What does the mod actually do? **A companion CoolPlayer303!** * She **follows you** around the world and fights mobs * She **picks up items** from the ground (after a delay, and won't steal from near you) * She **gathers resources**: give her an axe and she'll chop trees, give her a pickaxe and she'll mine ores * She has her own **24-slot inventory** (right-click her to open it) * You can **equip her with armor and weapons** through her inventory * You can give her **food** to heal her and raise trust * You can give her **flowers** — each unique flower gives a big trust boost * You can set her to **Stay / Follow** mode * You can **ask her 50 different questions** from a side panel in her GUI — her answers change depending on how she feels about you --- ### The Story The mod has a full 4-act storyline that unfolds as you play: * **ACT I** ▉▉▉▉▉▉▉ * **ACT II** ▉▉▉▉▉▉▉ or ▉▉▉▉ * **ACT III** ▉▉▉▉▉ or ▉▉▉▉▉▉ * **ACT IV** ▉▉▉▉▉▉▉ or ▉▉▉▉▉▉▉▉▉
6 Endings (and 4 pseudo-endings) | Ending | Name | How | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | **A** | Freedom | Collect all 4 memory shards, craft the Star of Memories, and enter the Door of Memory. | | **B** | Acceptance | Enter the correct password in the password dimension. | | **C** | ▉▉▉▉? | Enter the dimension without the Star. | | **D** | Mental Confusion | Complete all of Aiko's tasks, but after transferring to the dimension, fail the password 3 times. | | **E** | Violence | Hit the player ▉ times, make them angry, and fail to decipher the code before the 3-day limit. | | **F** | Betrayal | Complete all of Aiko's tasks, but treat her badly (including using bad words) before handing over the items. |
--- ### Meta-Horror Effects (WARNING!) **IMPORTANT — READ BEFORE PLAYING!** Unlike the "safe" version on CurseForge, this mod goes beyond the game for maximum immersion. One day, after entering your singleplayer world, another player will join you. At first, they seem kind, but only until you decide to attack them. That’s when the real game begins. **THIS IS NOT A VIRUS**, everything is done safely to enhance the story, but be ready: * THE MOD CAN **CHANGE YOUR DESKTOP WALLPAPER**. * THE MOD CAN **LOG YOUR IP ADDRESS** (You can hide it by using the command `/safeip`). * THE MOD CAN **CREATE FILES ON YOUR PC** (They are safe). * THE MOD CAN **OPEN APPLICATIONS**. * Expect real window shaking, actual console openings, and other actions beyond the Minecraft window. --- ### Commands | Command | Permission | Description | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | `/its config` | Anyone | Open the in-game config GUI | | `/its timer quest` | Anyone | Show remaining quest timer on action bar | | `/its timer pain` | Anyone | Show the pain path timer on action bar | | `/safeip` | Anyone | Hide logging of your IP address | | `/its enable` | OP | Re-enable commands if the story blocked them | | `/its progress unlock_all`| OP | Unlock all progression nodes | The mod has a config file (`inside_the_system-common.toml`), or you can simply use `/its config` in-game to open the GUI and customize timers, trust gains, and crash parameters. --- ### Languages The mod is fully translated into: * English * Russian * Chinese (Simplified)
